Play Hard.

Spots 24
Sound familiar?
₹450/hr per person. Every time you play.
₹212/hr. New balls and chilled water included. Save ₹9,724/month.
Courts unavailable. Booked. Wrong time. Wrong day.
Two courts. Every weeknight. Flexible time. Ours.
Chasing 3 people just to confirm a game
Your spot is always confirmed.
Different strangers every session. Zero chemistry.
Same crew. Real partnerships. Better padel.
Showing up to play with someone who can't rally
Everyone here can actually play.
Dead, flat balls that kill the game before it starts
Always fresh tournament-grade balls.
Hunting for water. Dispenser. Five-minute walk. Paying per bottle.
Free cold bottles waiting at the court.
What this is

Consistent courts.
Consistent people.
Consistent game.

[DETAILS TBD] — Group details coming soon for Courtiers Club evening.

What's included
Premium Tournament-Grade Balls
Fresh cans of tournament-grade padel balls opened per court every session. You always play with balls that feel right — no dead, flat, or tired balls.
Cold Water, Every Night
A daily supply of chilled water bottles waiting at the courts. No paying per bottle, no warm dispenser water, no five-minute walk mid-session.
Two Dedicated Courts
Both courts, every weeknight. Match time is decided by the group each day. No sharing, no waiting, no wondering if courts are free.
Organised Play
A dedicated Day Leader manages scheduling, rotations, and the daily registration. You just bring your racket.
Consistency & Club Feel
Play with the same competitive players every week. Your game improves faster when you know who you're playing with and what to expect.
Tournaments & Social Events
Internal round-robins, subscriber tournaments and one social event per month. Food and drinks included.
Game Footage
Professional cameras on every court. Watch your sessions back, track your improvement and share highlights. Details coming soon. This is a core part of what makes PCI different.
Founding Member Welcome Kit
Club tshirt and cap for all founding batch members. A marker of the beginning.
What we play
Format
Americano
Rotating partners, everyone plays with everyone. Points-based, competitive, and a great way to get to know the whole group's game.
Format
Mexicano
You're paired with and against players at your level as scores update in real time. Every match is competitive regardless of who's playing.
Format
Spontaneous Tournaments
Fixed teams, bracket play, bragging rights. Organised on the night when numbers are right and the energy calls for it.
Session
Drills & Practice
Dedicated practice nights: serve patterns, wall play, volleys, lobs. Structured improvement, not just match play. One of the most underrated sessions.
Format
Open Doubles
Pick your partner, challenge any pair. Classic padel the way it was meant to be played, on your terms, with people you trust on your side.
Wildcard
Whatever the Night Calls For
Sometimes the group decides on the night. The format flexes around who shows up and what kind of session everyone's in the mood for.
Membership
[DATE TBD]

Choose your commitment.

Everything included — courts, new tournament-grade balls, chilled water, monthly social events and a founding member welcome kit. The longer you commit, the better the rate.

Pricing
[PRICING TBD] — Coming soon
Optional add-on
Coaching Add-on · ₹5,000/month
Get better, faster.

20 minutes 1-on-1 with a coach every week. Your coach reviews your game footage, identifies patterns, and works with you on court. Targeted improvement — not generic advice.

2 hours of coached group drills every weekend. Maximum 6 members per coach. Serve patterns, positioning, wall play, and whatever the group needs most.

Non-refundable once a month has begun. Missed 1-on-1 slots do not carry over. Cancel at the end of any billing month with notice before renewal.
The app

Everything runs
through Reclub.

No WhatsApp chaos. No manual sign-up sheets. No "what time tonight?" messages an hour before. The subscription runs on Reclub, a dedicated app built exactly for sports groups like this one. Every member gets access. Everything happens in one place.

Private group · Subscribers only
Register for tonight in one tap
See who's confirmed, who's on the waitlist. No chasing, no confirming over chat.
Vote on the format
Mexicano tonight or a round robin? The group votes, the Day Leader locks it in. Democracy on the court.
Team draws & pairings
Teams divided fairly and randomly. No awkward picking, no same pairs every night.
Track your history & stats
Sessions played, wins, partners — your padel record, all in one place over time.
Community chat
Talk game, plan sessions, share clips without it getting buried in a family WhatsApp group.
Leaderboards & competitions
Live scores during Americanos and Mexicanos. Standings that update as you play.

Interested?
Get notified.

This group is coming soon. WhatsApp us to join the waitlist.

Join the waitlist
The rules
🚩
Cancel 6+ hours before or don't register
2+ late cancellations a month risks termination
🚩
Intermediate level and above only
You may be assessed before joining
🚩
Bring your own racket
Rentals available at the venue if needed
🚩
Guests only when numbers are short
Or if all players that night agree. Day Leader decides.
🚩
Hard cap of 24 members
Waitlist only once full. Spots open when someone leaves.
